wasm_log.h(3) Library Functions Manual wasm_log.h(3)

NAME

wasm_log.h - Shared logging macros for WASM modules.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define WASM_LOG(msg)
#define WASM_LOG_INT(msg, val)
#define WASM_ERROR(msg)

Detailed Description

Shared logging macros for WASM modules.

Provides unified WASM_LOG* macros that can be configured per-module. Define WASM_LOG_USE_ERROR before including to use console.error instead of console.log.

Definition in file wasm_log.h.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define WASM_ERROR( msg)

Value:

EM_ASM({ console.error('[C] ERROR: ' + UTF8ToString($0)); }, msg)

  WASM_LOG( msg)


Value:


EM_ASM({ console.log('[C] ' + UTF8ToString($0)); }, msg)

#define
  WASM_LOG_INT( msg, val)


Value:


EM_ASM({ console.log('[C] ' + UTF8ToString($0) + ': ' + $1); }, msg, val)
